heading: Tired Eyes. Blurry Vision. Glasses You Hate?
description: Discover New Vision Eye Centre, a NABH certified eye hospital in Paschim Vihar, Delhi. Specializing in ICL and glaucoma treatments with over 33,000 satisfied patients. Book your appointment today for expert eye care!

Blurry Vision. Glasses You Hate? You're Not Alone  And There's a Real Solution. Get expert eye care from AIIMS-qualified specialists at New Vision Eye Centre, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi. Book Appointment Call Now NABH Certified Super specialty eye care AIIMS qualified doctors Cashless / TPA Available Does Any of This Sound Like You? You're not alone. Millions of people ignore these signs until it's too late. I hate being dependent on glasses every single day. My eyes feel tired and strained after just 1 hour on screen. My vision is getting blurry especially at night. Someone told me I may have cataract. I'm scared. My eyes are always dry, red or watery. It won't stop. My eye power keeps increasing every year. Will it ever stop? Book a Free Eye Checkup Today If you said YES to even one of these your eyes are telling you something. Don't ignore it. A Trusted Eye Care Centre Built for Every Patient , Backed by Expertise & Precision. Know More 20,000+ Patients Treated Trusted by thousands of families across West Delhi & beyond. AIIMS Qualified Doctor Dr. Manik Mittal brings top-tier expertise to your neighbourhood. NABH Certified Hospital Meeting India's highest standards for safety and patient care. All TPA & Govt. Panel Cashless treatment available care that fits your budget. Everything Your Eyes Need Under One Roof From specs removal to cataract surgery. we treat every eye problem with care, precision and the latest technology. ✅ No Stitch  ✅ Blade-Free  ✅ Quick Recovery 🔬 CATARACT SURGERY : Blurry vision? Seeing halos at night? It could be cataract. We perform no-stitch, blade-free cataract surgery safe, quick, and highly effective. Most patients see clearly within 24 hours. ✅ Painless ✅ Permanent ✅ Done in minutes 👁️ LASIK / Contoura LASIK Tired of wearing glasses or lenses? LASIK is a painless, 15-minute procedure that permanently corrects your vision. Contoura LASIK the most advanced version gives even sharper results with faster recovery. ✅ No Cornea Cutting ✅ HD Vision ✅ Reversible 💎 ICL SURGERY (Implantable Contact Lens) Not suitable for LASIK? ICL is the perfect alternative. A micro-thin lens is placed inside your eye  giving you crystal-clear vision without glasses. Safe, reversible and permanent. ✅ Early Detection   ✅ Medication & Surgery                ✅ Regular Monitoring 🌡️ GLAUCOMA TREATMENT Glaucoma is called the "silent thief of sight." It causes no pain  but slowly damages your vision without warning. Early detection saves your eyesight. Don't wait for symptoms. ✅ Early Screening ✅ Laser Treatment   ✅ Regular Monitoring for Diabetic Patients 🩸 DIABETIC RETINOPATHY Have diabetes? Your eyes are at risk. High blood sugar silently damages the tiny blood vessels inside your eyes — often with no early warning signs. ✅ Eyelid Surgery ✅ Tear Duct Treatment ✅ Eye Socket Repair 👁️ OCULOPLASTY Problems with your eyelids, tear ducts or the area around your eyes? Drooping eyelids, blocked tear ducts, eye socket problems — we treat them all. Dr. Mittal explained the entire procedure very clearly and made me feel calm and confident. The surgery was quick, painless, and smooth. The staff was very supportive and professional throughout. I am extremely satisfied with the results. Highly recommended for anyone considering LASIK.
